steps.title: Find the reduced scale factor
steps.content:
A side length that is $70\%$ shorter keeps $30\%$ of the original side length:
$$
100\%-70\%=30\%=0.30
$$
Both maps show the same actual region, so each inch on the smaller map must represent more miles than each inch on the original map.

steps.title: Invert the distance scale
steps.content: The reduced map uses only $0.30$ as many inches for the same actual distance. Therefore, the miles represented by one inch are divided by $0.30$: $$ \frac{14}{0.30}=\frac{140}{3} $$ That value is about $46.67$ miles. The answer is D.
